summary: Iteration 30: Tested 4 bug fixes for consultant CMS. All fixes verified working: (1) Service descriptions render as HTML without raw tags, (2) No word breaking issues, (3) All services have Read More links with proper external_url fallback, (4) Hero video admin input is URL-based (not iframe textarea), (5) HeroSection handles video URLs with auto-embed.
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.js: cleanHtml function (line 27) properly replaces   with spaces
HomePage.js: ServiceLink component (lines 97-103) correctly handles external_url vs fallback to /service/{id}
HomePage.js: All 3 theme variants use dangerouslySetInnerHTML with cleanHtml for service descriptions (lines 119, 145, 168)
LayoutServicesGrid.js: Uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML with cleanHtml (line 36) and has external_url fallback (lines 42-56)
BlockRenderer.js: ServiceListBlock uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML (line 56) with external_url fallback (lines 58-62)
HeroSlideForm.js: Video input is <Input> component with URL label and YouTube placeholder (lines 179-183)
HeroSection.js: resolveVideoEmbed function (lines 5-16) handles YouTube, Vimeo, legacy iframe, and direct URLs
index.css: rich-text-content has word-break: break-word and hyphens: auto (lines 281-287)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes from iteration 30 verified working. Service descriptions render as formatted HTML (no raw tags visible). Word wrapping works correctly with CSS rules. All services have Read More links - external_url takes priority, otherwise falls back to /service/{id}. Hero video admin input accepts URLs (YouTube, Vimeo, direct) instead of iframe code. HeroSection auto-embeds video URLs.

word_breaking.css_rules: PASS - word-break: break-word, hyphens: auto in index.css

service_read_more_links.all_services_have_links: PASS - 3/3 services have Read More links
service_read_more_links.navigation_works: PASS - Service detail page loads correctly

hero_video_admin_input.label_mentions_url: PASS - 'Video URL (YouTube, Vimeo, or direct video link)'

hero_video_embed.legacy_iframe_handling: PASS - Extracts src from iframe string
